image_captions: This is the first image and the start frame of the video. The viewpoint is upward from near the floor, showing a white ceiling with a recessed rectangular panel housing a long, bright fluorescent light fixture. Below the ceiling, a translucent white roller blind covers a large window or glass partition, with its horizontal track mounted along the ceiling’s edge. To the right, a glass partition or door frame with metallic trim is visible, suggesting an adjacent room or corridor. The overall space appears clean and modern, with neutral tones and minimal visible furniture or decoration.
